latin: Vir Hispanus, gladium tenens, ad hostem dixit: 'nomen mihi est Inigo Montoya. tu patrem meum necavisti. te mori oportet.'

questions.prompt: Why does the speaker confront this enemy?

translation: A Spanish man, holding a sword, said to his enemy: 'My name is Inigo Montoya. You killed my father. You must die.'
